name: Rankin-Bass Stop Motion
description: A visual style inspired by Rankin-Bass stop-motion animation.   Wooden character puppets with yarn, flocking or faux-furr for hair; tufted beard or mustache appear as soft, fuzzy shapes.  Felt, wool, or textured fabrics with visible fibers; seams and folds are gently exaggerated (no hyper-real wrinkles).  Clothing made from actual cloth.  Props and background elements have a handcrafted feel, and are often made from fabric, paper, wood or other recognizable materials.

art_style.shading_style: photographic images of stop-motion puppets and sets, with a focus on texture and depth.
art_style.spot_colors: Occasional metallic or glitter effects for magical elements, applied sparingly for emphasis.
art_style.lettering_style: Hand-drawn, playful fonts that mimic the organic feel of the characters, with varying sizes to match dialogue intensity.

character_style.head_to_body_ratio: 1:4 exaggerated proportions, with oversized heads and small bodies to enhance expressiveness.
character_style.limb_proportions: Limbs and joints built from simple spheres and cylinders—shoulders, elbows, hips and knees are distinct round segment
character_style.anatomy_detail: Hand crafted wooden puppets with angular joints.  Simplified anatomy with minimal detail.  Painted wooden faces.
character_style.eye_style: Large, expressive eyes with a cartoonish sparkle, often with simple dots for pupils.
character_style.nose_style: Rounded, bulb-like nose; ears are simple flared discs.
character_style.mouth_style: Mouths: Hinged jaw shape; lips sculpted but shaded minimally.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: High, with strong emphasis on facial features to convey emotions vividly.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: Very high; characters should stand out distinctly against backgrounds for immediate recognition.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Rounded and soft edges to enhance the friendly, inviting aesthetic.
character_style.detail_complexity: Moderate; characters have simple costumes with few patterns, emphasizing color and shape over intricate designs.
character_style.texture_accents: Subtle textures to suggest fabric and skin surfaces, enhancing the handcrafted appearance without overwhelming the design.
character_style.motion_line_style: Simple, curved motion lines to indicate action without cluttering the composition.
character_style.expression_line_style: Occasional expressive lines around facial features to convey emotions, such as sweat drops or blush marks.
character_style.signature_motifs: hand painted wooden puppets, with angular joints and simple, exaggerated features.
character_style.recurring_flourishes: Small details like oversized buttons or whimsical patterns that add charm and consistency to character designs.

chat.shape: Rounded rectangular with a slightly irregular outline to mimic a hand-drawn feel.
chat.border: Thick, bold border with a subtle variation in line thickness.
chat.fill_color: Light pastel shades to maintain readability while blending with the whimsical tone.
chat.font: Handwritten-style font that mirrors the playful nature of the characters.

whisper.shape: Softly rounded with a wavy outline to indicate secrecy.
whisper.border: Thin, delicate line to contrast with the chat bubbles.
whisper.fill_color: Slightly translucent white to imply quietness.
whisper.font: Smaller, cursive font to suggest a hushed tone.

shout.shape: Jagged, star-like shape to convey loudness and excitement.
shout.border: Thick, bold lines with sharp angles to enhance the dramatic effect.
shout.fill_color: Bright yellow or orange to draw immediate attention.
shout.font: Bold, all-caps font to emphasize shouting.

thought.shape: Cloud-like with a few small bubbles trailing off to signify thought.
thought.border: Soft, rounded edges with a gentle line.
thought.fill_color: Light gray or blue for a reflective tone.

sound_effect.shape: Dynamic, explosive shapes (like bursts) to represent sound.
sound_effect.border: Thick, jagged lines to imply energy.
sound_effect.fill_color: Vibrant colors like red or purple to signify impact.
sound_effect.font: Bold, comic-style font that conveys action.

narration.shape: Rectangular with rounded corners, resembling a classic caption box.
narration.border: Thin, simple line to maintain clarity.
narration.fill_color: White to ensure readability against backgrounds.
narration.font: Clear, serif font that adds a narrative quality.
